description: User clicks the 'Done' button on the date picker modal to confirm their travel dates
frame_description: The user moves the cursor to the 'Done' button in the bottom right of the calendar modal and clicks it.

description: User clicks the 'Search Flights' button to begin the flight search process
frame_description: After closing the date picker, the user clicks the primary 'Search Flights' call to action.

description: The browser navigates from the homepage to the flight search results page
frame_description: The URL changes and the page content transitions to the search results interface.

description: A loading animation featuring a plane flying between Brisbane and London is displayed while results are fetched
frame_description: The search results page shows a 'Available airfares will be displayed shortly' message with a progress animation.
